name: Kailong High Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Kailong High Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, sale, and after-sales service of SCR exhaust after-treatment products. It offers light and heavy duty diesel, marine/stationary engine, gasoline engine, and CNG engine after treatment systems, as well as diesel particulate filters, exhaust treatment devices for tunnel/industrial stoves, vehicle exhaust heating systems, auto temperature-control cooling systems of engine, centralized lubrication systems of passenger-carrying chassis, eddy current retarders, carriers and catalytic products, components and parts of bus, etc. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Wuxi, China.
